title: Acceptance Criteria: lifecycle traceability delivery slice

prioritization.priority_rationale: Acceptance criteria are the final bounded guardrail that keeps the lifecycle slice implementation-ready without hiding later-stage ambiguity.
prioritization.reviewer_handoff: QA should confirm each criterion stays testable and does not imply scope beyond release readiness.

criteria.statement: The canonical item trace shows the approved story-planning output linked back to the originating PRD and opportunity.
The trace exposes acceptance-ready criteria that remain testable without inventing downstream scope.
The trace reaches release readiness while keeping launch preparation and outcome review explicitly not started.
